name: Sakura Yamauchi
description:
A high school student who suffers a pancreatic disease, having her lifespan cut in half. She has a diary called "Living with Dying" where she writes about her daily experiences, since her illness was first diagnosed. 

Despite her situation, she keeps her smile and even makes jokes about it.

~!She was later stabbed after being discharged from the hospital and sadly passed away.!~
